data.title: Banco de Chile Places Bonds in Local Market
data.description:
Banco De Chile ( (BCH) ) has shared an announcement.

On March 20, 2025, Banco de Chile successfully placed senior, dematerialized, and bearer bonds in the local market. The bonds, registered under Serie FC, amounted to 300,000 Chilean UF with a maturity date set for January 1, 2030, and an average placement rate of 2.97%. This bond placement is a significant move for Banco de Chile, potentially strengthening its financial position and market presence.

More about Banco De Chile

Banco de Chile is a prominent financial institution in Chile, primarily engaged in providing a wide range of banking services. The bank focuses on offering financial products such as loans, savings accounts, and investment services to both individual and corporate clients in the Chilean market.

YTD Price Performance: 26.73%

Average Trading Volume: 224,406

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Sell

Current Market Cap: $14.44B

data.title: Tower Limited Announces Capital Restructuring with Share Redemption
data.description:
Tower Limited ( (AU:TWR) ) has issued an announcement.

Tower Limited has announced a capital change involving the redemption of 38,060,062 ordinary shares as part of a return of capital scheme approved by the High Court and shareholders. This move, effective March 20, 2025, will result in the cancellation of one ordinary share for every ten held, impacting 10% of the total class of financial products. The redemption is part of a strategic financial restructuring aimed at optimizing the company’s capital structure, with implications for shareholder value and market positioning.

More about Tower Limited

Tower Limited operates in the financial services industry, primarily focusing on providing insurance products. The company is known for its ordinary shares and has a market presence in New Zealand and Australia.

YTD Price Performance: 24.87%

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Sell

data.title: Greenlane Renewables Reports Strong Financial Gains and Technological Advances in 2024
data.description:
Greenlane Renewables Inc ( (TSE:GRN) ) has shared an update.

Greenlane Renewables reported a significant improvement in its financial performance for the fiscal year 2024, with an 81% increase in adjusted EBITDA and a strengthened cash position. The company achieved notable operational milestones, including new contracts and patent filings for advanced landfill gas upgrading technology, positioning itself for further growth and innovation in the renewable energy sector.

More about Greenlane Renewables Inc

Greenlane Renewables Inc. operates in the renewable energy industry, focusing on the development and supply of biogas upgrading systems. The company specializes in converting landfill gas to renewable natural gas (RNG), with a market focus on expanding its technological innovations and international presence.

data.title: Thumzup Media Corporation Executes Share Buyback Program
data.description:
Thumzup Media Corporation ( (TZUP) ) has shared an announcement.

On March 18 and 19, 2025, Thumzup Media Corporation repurchased 34,377 shares of its common stock for approximately $126,507 as part of its share buyback program authorized up to $1 million. This initiative underscores the company’s commitment to enhancing shareholder value and reflects confidence in its growth strategy. Thumzup has surpassed 700 advertisers on its platform, achieving a compound annual growth rate exceeding 200%, and is exploring potential acquisitions to further boost revenue and cash flow.

More about Thumzup Media Corporation

Thumzup Media Corporation is an emerging leader in the social media branding and programmatic marketing solutions industry. The company offers a platform that allows individuals to earn cash by posting about advertisers on social media through its app, leveraging a programmatic advertiser dashboard for campaign customization. Thumzup aims to democratize the multi-billion dollar social media marketing industry.

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

data.title: NioCorp Elects Directors and Secures Shareholder Support at AGM
data.description:
NioCorp Developments ( (NB) ) has issued an update.

NioCorp Developments Ltd. announced the election results of its directors at the Annual General Meeting held in Denver, Colorado. All seven nominees were successfully elected to serve until the next annual meeting. Additionally, shareholders approved the appointment of Deloitte & Touche LLP as auditors and endorsed the executive compensation plan. This election and shareholder support may strengthen NioCorp’s governance and operational strategies as it continues to develop its Elk Creek Project, potentially impacting its market position and stakeholder confidence.

More about NioCorp Developments

NioCorp Developments Ltd. is focused on developing a critical minerals project in Southeast Nebraska, known as the Elk Creek Project. The company aims to produce niobium, scandium, and titanium, and is also exploring the potential to produce rare earth elements. These materials are essential for various industries, including automotive, aerospace, and electronics, due to their applications in creating strong, lightweight alloys and advanced magnets.

data.title: Banco de Sabadell Approves Key Financial Agreements and Reactivates Share Buyback Program
data.description:
Banco de Sabadell ( (ES:SAB) ) has issued an announcement.

Banco de Sabadell held its Ordinary General Shareholders’ Meeting where several key agreements were approved, including the annual accounts and management report for 2024, the non-financial and sustainability information statement, and a new shareholder remuneration policy. Additionally, a significant decision was made to reactivate a share buyback program worth up to 247 million euros, aiming to reduce share capital and enhance shareholder value by increasing profit per share. This move is expected to positively impact the company’s financial structure and shareholder returns.

More about Banco de Sabadell

Banco de Sabadell is a prominent financial institution operating in the banking industry, offering a range of financial services including personal and corporate banking, investment services, and wealth management. The company focuses on serving both individual and business clients, with a strong presence in the Spanish market.

data.title: GoGold Resources Secures C$75 Million for Project Development
data.description:
GoGold Resources ( (TSE:GGD) ) has issued an update.

GoGold Resources Inc. has announced a C$75 million bought deal financing agreement with a syndicate of underwriters led by BMO Capital Markets. The proceeds will be used for the development of the Los Ricos South project, exploration activities at both Los Ricos South and North projects, and general corporate purposes. This financing is expected to bolster GoGold’s operational capabilities and enhance its project development in Mexico, potentially strengthening its position in the silver and gold production industry.

More about GoGold Resources

GoGold Resources is a Canadian-based silver and gold producer focused on operating, developing, exploring, and acquiring high-quality projects in Mexico. The company operates the Parral Tailings mine in Chihuahua and has the Los Ricos South and Los Ricos North exploration and development projects in Jalisco. Headquartered in Halifax, Nova Scotia, GoGold is building a portfolio of low-cost, high-margin projects.

data.title: SHF Holdings Expands Vision to Support Cannabis Industry
data.description:
SHF Holdings ( (SHFS) ) has provided an update.

On March 13, 2025, SHF Holdings held a special meeting where CEO Terrance Mendez outlined the company’s strategic vision. Safe Harbor plans to expand its services beyond compliance solutions to include a broader array of products aimed at supporting cannabis businesses. The company aims to capitalize on the projected growth of the US cannabis industry, which is expected to exceed $76 billion by 2030. Recent financial adjustments, including modifying debt terms and reducing costs, are intended to fund product innovation and enhance market positioning. Safe Harbor is focusing on four product categories—Protects, Lends, Enables, and Connects—to improve the cannabis business ecosystem, with plans to offer banking services to cannabis employees and develop an earned wage access program.

More about SHF Holdings

SHF Holdings, Inc., operating as Safe Harbor, is a company focused on providing compliant banking solutions to the cannabis industry. Based in Colorado, Safe Harbor has been a pioneer in addressing the banking challenges faced by cannabis-related businesses, expanding its services to include loan origination and participation. The company operates in 41 states and territories, leveraging a compliance-first model to support the integrity of cannabis businesses’ access to the US banking system.

YTD Price Performance: -34.29%

Average Trading Volume: 191,800

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

Current Market Cap: $15.91M
